reviews.review_description: As a backrooms fan i would honestly say that this backrooms game is just a 10 out of 10 like the levels and their design is just great but sadly i didn't make it that far I only made it to level 2 i took me while to get to level 2 cause the monster in level 1 kept killing me when i got near the exit, but still this game is a 10 out of 10 so i won't hate on it.

This is the best vr backrooms game I've even seen and just overall the best backrooms game I've played and seen it's super realistic the developers really put a lot work in to this game but I have no idea how to get past the first level
Me and my friend cant even get past the first level this game SUCKS
The grahpics are very good i just cant find out how to find the pit
